vazhvil varum

naanum neeyum
kaalam ezhudhi

andha kaatre meendum inaithu

dhevamullai
pookkum kollai.
kondathe en veetin ellai.

ennai nee maravaadhiru
puyal kaatrilum priyaathiru

Megathootham paadavendum

thumbai pole thooya azhagai

eeram oorum kannin meedhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Megathoodham?

The song Megathoodham explores themes of dreams and longing, reflecting deep emotional sentiments.

What is the context of this song in the movie Airaa?

In Airaa, the song captures a pivotal moment of introspection and emotional turmoil for the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of Megathoodham?

The song is sung by Padmapriya Raghavan and composed by Sundaramurthy KS.

When was Megathoodham released?

Megathoodham was released on February 5, 2019.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Megathoodham, the listener is taken on an emotional journey through dreams and aspirations. The soothing melody, combined with poignant lyrics by Thamarai, evokes a sense of longing and introspection. As it plays in the backdrop of Airaa, it highlights the characters' struggles and desires. The heartfelt rendition by Padmapriya Raghavan adds depth to the song, making it a memorable experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Megathoodham is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and dreams. With Padmapriya Raghavan's soulful voice and Thamarai's poignant lyrics, this track from the movie Airaa resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of Sundaramurthy KS's composition that perfectly complements the emotional depth of the song.
stanzaMeanings: The great cloud must sing a great song.
Will the dream of the dark sky be fulfilled? Will the moon of the rainy season bring light in the darkness of loneliness?
This too is a dream that will fade away, I fear it will come to my heart day by day.
This too is a dream that will fade away, I fear it will come to my heart day by day.
The great cloud must sing a great song, the rain must fall on the mountain, the king must be seen, the rainbow will return in life.
The great cloud must sing a great song.
You and I write the time, a drama blown by the wind. That wind will again bring the stage for the epic.
The flower of the divine blooms in the garden. It is the boundary of my home.
Do not forget me, even in the stormy wind, my beloved.
The great cloud must sing a great song, the rain must fall on the mountain, the king must be seen, the rainbow will return in life.
Like a flower, I see your pure beauty. I wonder what tomorrow will bring for all of us.
When this word is heard, the tears will flow, the cloud of sorrow will not settle on the eyes of the innocent.
Will the dream of the dark sky be fulfilled? Will the moon of the rainy season bring light in the darkness of loneliness?
This too is a dream that will fade away, I fear it will come to my heart day by day.
